input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.4.2
            TITLE: when the charging shutdown circuit opens:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.4.2: When the Charging Shutdown Circuit Opens:
EV.8.4.2 When the Charging Shutdown Circuit Opens: 
a. All current flow to the Accumulator must stop immediately 
b. The voltage in the Tractive System must be Low Voltage T.9.1.2 in five seconds or less 
c. The Charger must be turned off  
d. The Charger must stay disabled until manually reset

final_answer: rule EV.8.4.2: When the Charging Shutdown Circuit Opens: EV.8.4.2 When the Charging Shutdown Circuit Opens: a. All current flow to the Accumulator must stop immediately b. The voltage in the Tractive System must be Low Voltage T.9.1.2 in five seconds or less c. The Charger must be turned off d. The Charger must stay disabled until manually reset
